properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6 V7 V8

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Until this day no man can tell us Just where we came from And where we go from here But through the eyes of the prophet God revealed to us Before God was God All the way to future home

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: New things are being declared I know very soon I'll be raptured out of here Angel of God is here Leading our souls into The invisible, the inaudible, the inconceivable Faith to believe for the impossible In this new day

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: The Angel of God Not seen for two thousand years appeared He's here fixing things For us to leave He's waving visions Of ourselves before us So we can walk step by step Into what we behold

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: New things are being declared I know very soon I'll be raptured out of here Angel of God is here Leading our souls into The invisible, the inaudible, the inconceivable Faith to believe for the impossible In this new day

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Eyes have not seen, nor ears heard The things that are God has prepared For those whom He loves But in this day God displayed if you say Then nothing shall be impossible unto you

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: New things are being declared I know very soon I'll be raptured out of here Angel of God is here Leading our souls into The invisible, the inaudible, the inconceivable Faith to believe for the impossible In this new day

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Oh north, you give them up I'm determined they'll declare My praise Oh south, you hold not back For this people I've formed for Myself

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: New things are being declared I know very soon I'll be raptured out of here Angel of God is here Leading our souls into The invisible, the inaudible, the inconceivable Faith to believe for the impossible In this new day Oh north, you give them up I'm determined they'll declare My praise Oh south, you hold not back For this people I've formed for Myself
